completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: TypeScript ESM npm package, primary project type cli, with library exports and local MCP server capability.

Found existing README, six user docs under docs/, archived reference discussions, planning artifacts, architecture artifacts, stories, code reviews, and retrospectives; user requested emphasis on MCP/IDE integration, CLI/SQLite storage, and framework adapters/scanner.
Analyzed TypeScript ESM npm package stack: Node.js 20, commander CLI, MCP SDK, better-sqlite3, unified/remark, Zod, tsup, Vitest, ESLint flat config, and Prettier.
Completed deep conditional analysis for CLI/MCP, SQLite Repository and Service layer, scanner pipeline, BMAD/Generic framework adapters, and IDE adapters.
Generated annotated source tree analysis for src, tests, docs, _bmad-output, and GitHub workflows.
Generated development guide covering prerequisites, scripts, CLI/MCP validation, coding conventions, testing, packaging, and common troubleshooting.
Generated architecture documentation for the single cord part, covering multi-entry shared service architecture and core module boundaries.
Generated supporting documentation: project overview, module inventory, data models, source tree analysis, and development guide.
Generated docs/index.md as the master AI retrieval entry point with links to generated and existing documentation.
Validated generated documentation with Prettier, incomplete-marker scan, line counts, and user review menu; user selected Finalize and complete.
Workflow complete; docs/index.md is the master AI retrieval entry point.

primary_part.notes: Single npm package exposing a cord CLI binary, public library exports, and an MCP server backed by shared services.

findings.user_context: 重点覆盖 MCP Tool 与 IDE 集成、CLI 与 SQLite 本地存储、框架适配器与扫描引擎。
